nodes.name: 北美洲

nodes.name: American goshawk
nodes.summary: American goshawk（American goshawk，学名 Astur atricapillus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联27个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括污染、农药污染、人类活动扰动等4项。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In North America, they are most broadly found in the Western United States, including Alaska, and western Canada

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Their breeding range in the western contiguous United States largely consists of the wooded foothills of the Rocky Mountains and many other large mountain ranges from Washington to southern California extending east to central Colorado and westernmost Texas. Somewhat discontinuous breeding populations are found in southeastern Arizona and southwestern New Mexico, thence also somewhat spottily into western Mexico down through Sonora and Chihuahua along the Sierra Madre Occidental as far as Jalisco and Guerrero, their worldwide southern limit as a breeding species.Monson, G

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The goshawk continues east through much of Canada as a native species, but is rarer in most of the Eastern United States, especially the Midwest, where they are not typically found outside the Great Lakes region, where a good-sized breeding population occurs in the northern parts of Minnesota, Illinois, Michigan, and somewhat into Ohio; a very small population persists in the extreme northeast corner of North Dakota

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|left|Adult in the Kaibab Plateau, [[Arizona, in a pine tree that typifies the habitat used locally]] American and Eurasian goshawks can be found in both deciduous and coniferous forests

links.label: 保护等级
links.evidence: status = LC

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: 31:13–20. In many parts of the range, historic populations decreased regionally due to human persecution (especially shooting), disturbance and epidemic loss of habitat, especially during the 19th century and early 20th. Some states, like Pennsylvania, paid $5 bounties on Goshawks in the 1930s. In the 1950s–1960s declines were increasingly linked with pesticide pollution

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Toxicol |volume= 36 |issue= 1|pages= 23–32 |doi=10.1007/bf01623470|pmid= 3079646 |s2cid= 28539093 }} Seemingly the remaining persistent conservation threat to goshawks, given their seeming overall resilience (at the species level) to both persecution and pesticides, is deforestation
